text.title: Requirements Lifecycle Management Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the requirements-lifecycle methodology end-to-end.

step.name: define-state-machine
step.action: Document allowed transitions + approvers per transition.

step.name: instrument
step.action: Add state field + transitions array per record.

step.name: process-change
step.action: Run impact analysis → multi-role sign-off → apply transition.

step.name: audit
step.action: Audit script verifies forward-only + immutable history.
step.decision-gate: Validate against the output contract before declaring done; if invalid, loop back to the failing step.
